title: About Us – Zen Rojas
meta_description: At Zen Rojas, we believe every sip is a reminder to slow down, breathe deeply, and reconnect with the moment. Our teas are crafted to bring harmony to your day — one mindful cup at a time. Veteran owned and family operated, Zen Rojas was born from a simple truth: calm is something we create. Through years of service and travel, we discovered how deeply nature can restore balance and peace. That experience shaped our mission — to provide organic, intentional blends that nourish both body and mind. Every tea we carry is designed to support your wellness — from grounding greens and soothing herbs to uplifting florals that awaken the senses. At our core, Zen Rojas is more than tea. It’s a ritual. A breath. A return to stillness. Thank you for sharing a cup with us. From our family to yours — peace, gratitude, and good tea. Zen Rojas Proudly Veteran-Owned and family operated | Crafted with Intention | Rooted in Calm
